dialog_history.content: Hello, how can I help you?
I have a substernal chest pressure that began about an hour ago. It radiates to my left jaw and arm, and I am experiencing diaphoresis and mild dyspnea.
It started while I was climbing the stairs. The pain is currently at a level seven, though it eased slightly at rest.
I have a history of hyperlipidemia and prediabetes. I currently take atorvastatin 40mg nightly and 81mg of aspirin daily.
[DDX] (ST-elevation myocardial infarction; Non-ST-elevation myocardial infarction; Unstable angina; Aortic dissection; Pulmonary embolism)
